texto: So we are steaming along without any landmark
autor: we can't gauge our speed. We are making progress and yet nothing is changing. It's not navigation but dreaming.
explicacao: Citação de we can't gauge our speed. We are making progress and yet nothing is changing. It's not navigation but dreaming. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “So we are steaming along without any landmark” articula reflexao, albert-camus, steaming em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
